name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Youngstown's 5 Star Car Title Loans at 3212 South Ave serves OH residents needing quick title loans and emergency cash.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans is located at 3212 South Ave #2 in Youngstown, OH, serving the local community with quick financial solutions. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM, and closed on Sundays, making it accessible for most working residents in the Youngstown area.

At this Youngstown location, borrowers can obtain title loans, payday loans, and other quick cash advances. The staff at 3212 South Ave can discuss your borrowing options and process applications on the spot. Call 330-964-3234 to ask about terms, requirements, and how much you can borrow based on your vehicle and financial situation.

If you need immediate cash in Youngstown, OH, this 5 Star Car Title Loans branch is designed for fast approval and same-day funding. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and clear title to your vehicle to expedite the process. Whether you're facing an emergency or need funds between paychecks, the team at this South Ave location understands the financial pressures facing Youngstown residents.
pros: Funds available same day for approved applicants
No credit check required — bad credit borrowers may still qualify
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle throughout the loan term
No prepayment penalties — pay off early without extra fees
Loan amounts up to $50,000 based on vehicle equity
Licensed and regulated lender with 13+ years of operation since 2012
Accepts diverse collateral including cars, motorcycles, and semi-trucks
cons: APR and interest rates are not disclosed anywhere on the website — a major transparency gap
Vehicle is at risk of repossession if the borrower defaults
Only ~18 states served — not available nationwide
Public review base is extremely thin (11 reviews), making the 4.7 rating hard to assess
Title loans are a high-cost product inappropriate for non-emergency use
best_for: Vehicle owners with equity who need same-day cash and cannot qualify for traditional loans
Borrowers with poor or no credit facing an immediate financial emergency
Consumers in the 18 supported states who need between $1,000 and $50,000 against their car's value
People who need to cover urgent bills and can repay within a short loan term
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for vehicle-owning borrowers with damaged credit who need fast cash—up to $50,000—and can absorb a high-cost loan to handle a genuine emergency. The primary caveat is significant: the site does not disclose APR, and title loans typically carry triple-digit annual rates with vehicle repossession as the default consequence, making this a product to use only when all lower-cost options have been exhausted.
services: Car title loans (secured by vehicle, borrower keeps car)
Semi-truck and commercial vehicle title loans
Installment loans with up to 24-month repayment terms
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 3212 South Ave, Youngstown, OH. Get fast cash advances and title loans. Call 330-964-3234.
